channel.title: bugs on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in bugs on David's Blog

item.title: CGO Compile Error Building Docker Image
item.description: I choose a sqilte3 library which uses cgo, the Dockerfile: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 FROM golang:alpine WORKDIR /app COPY ./ ./ RUN go mod download RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o /server . CMD ["./server"] The CGO_ENABLED=0 is to disable cgo. GOOS=linux and GOARCH=arm64 is used for cross compilation in Go. Because I build this on my macOS arm64 machine, and I want build for Ubuntu amd64 machine, so I choose GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64.

item.title: ssh session vary slow
item.description: Connecting to my aws server with ssh client is very slow, and after connected, the session is very slow too. Like input a command in the ssh session and you have to wait seconds to get the output, lots of latency. Then I think maybe there is a “bad” process which takes a lot of cpu usages makes my server in high load, or there is a high network traffic. Then I use top command to check, then I got this:

item.title: 解决 npm 无法安装 packages 到本地文件夹问题
item.description: 使用 npm install xxx, 然后总是安装到 ~/node_modules/, 查了好多, 有的说用 npm config list 查看 global 的值, 改为 false 什么, 都没有用, 卸载 node 和 npm 重装依旧不能解决, 最后删除了 ~/node_modules/ 文件夹和 ~/ 下的所

item.title: grep不支持Negative Lookahead问题
item.description:
刚开始使用printf "123
24567
8930
234
" | egrep '(?<!2)3'提示egrep: repetition-operator operand invalid, 然后查到可以使用参数-P, 如下: 1 $ printf "123
24567
8930
234
" | grep -P '(?<!2)3' 但是仍然报错和上面

item.title: 启动Cloudflare代理导致无法通过域名解析出A记录中的IP
item.description: 这几天弄服务器, 用ssh通过域名连接的时候总是出现超时(域名只有一个A记录即服务器IP), 问题下面是分析思路, I’m trying to use ssh to connect my server with my domain name ssh root@www.davidzhu.xyz,

item.title: SSH连接远程主机出现的Connection Refused问题
item.description: 1 2 ssh root@144.202.12.32 ssh: connect to host 144.202.12.32 port 22: Connection refused 查的一些博客说修改mac设置成允许远程连接(这其实是允许别人连接你的mac电脑比如ssh localhost), 还有修改服务器里的配置文
